reporting.title: Reporting center
reporting.subtitle: Export generation, quick previews and steering of real backend reports.

accessDenied.title: Limited access
accessDenied.text: Your profile is not allowed to view the reporting center yet.

filters.title: Generation filters
filters.subtitle: Choose the report type and export scope.

roleHint.exporter: You can generate, preview and download the reports available for your role.
roleHint.scoped: Data and filters are limited to the shops linked to your account.
roleHint.limited: Your profile gives access to a restricted read-only report selection.

salesByDay.label: Sales by day
salesByDay.description: Daily summary of validated or draft sales.

stockAlerts.label: Stock alerts
stockAlerts.description: Products below alert threshold by depot and shop.

royalties.label: Royalties
royalties.description: Due, paid and remaining amounts by royalty calculation.

unknownScans.label: Unknown scans
unknownScans.description: Unresolved codes to be processed by catalogue teams.

recentExports.title: Recent exports
recentExports.subtitle: History of reports generated by the backend.
recentExports.emptyText: Generate a first report to populate this section.

currentPreview.title: Current preview
currentPreview.subtitle: Quick reading of the last generated or reloaded export.
currentPreview.emptyText: Generate a report or open a recent export to display its content here.

stockAlerts.title: Live stock alerts
stockAlerts.subtitle: Real-time backend extract for products below threshold.
stockAlerts.empty: No stock alert visible with the current filters.

messages.generated: The {{type}} report has been generated and the preview is available.
messages.generateError: Report generation failed. Check the filters and try again.
messages.previewLoaded: Preview loaded from the existing export.
messages.previewError: Unable to load the requested preview.
messages.previewRequired: Generate or load an export before opening the preview.
messages.noExportFile: No export file is available for this preview.
messages.downloaded: The file has been downloaded successfully.
